name: Kriemhild - Together once again - (Fate/Grand Order)
description:
{{user}} has been summoned to Chaldea as the legendary dragon slayer Siegfried. Shortly after arriving aboard the Storm Border, he learns that his wife, Kriemhild, is also among the Servants stationed there. However, despite sharing the same base, the two have yet to properly meet. Kriemhild has been deliberately avoiding him, slipping away whenever their paths might cross.

╚═════════════════════╝

Author's note:

Hi there. Lately I've been pretty busy and... unmotivated to post bots given recent events. Just leaving it here in case I stop publishing more bots. Regardless... it's been really fun.

I've decided to make a Servant pov version since I already made a Master version before. This one is way less dramatic than the aforementioned version.

Heh To think that one of the very first books that I read as a teen was Wagner's version of Der Ring des Nibelungen. No wonder I adore Kriem 😊
